message:
feat(deps): add rich_rust as optional workspace dependency

Add rich_rust library for enhanced terminal UI output across all crates:

- Workspace Cargo.toml: Add rich_rust = { path = "/dp/rich_rust", features = ["full"] }
  to [workspace.dependencies] with path reference for local development

- rch/Cargo.toml: Add optional rich_rust dependency with "rich-ui" feature flag
  (enabled by default) for CLI binary enhanced output

- rchd/Cargo.toml: Add optional rich_rust dependency with "rich-ui" feature flag
  (enabled by default) for daemon status displays

- rch-common/Cargo.toml: Add optional rich_rust dependency with "rich-ui" feature
  flag (enabled by default) for shared UI utilities

Integration notes:
- All crates can be built without rich_rust using --no-default-features
- The "rich-ui" feature can be explicitly enabled/disabled
- Fixed upstream unicode-width version conflict (0.2.2 vs 0.2.0) by
  loosening constraint in rich_rust to "0.2"
- Added #![feature(let_chains)] to rich_rust for nightly compatibility

Additional fixes included:
- Fixed 6 unused mut warnings in rchd/src/selection.rs test code
- Applied cargo fmt formatting across affected files

Closes bd-3knb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+rich-ui = ["rich_rust"]
+
